schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

identity.canonical_title: Cosmological-constant hierarchy as a radius choice

theory.canonical_statement: The 10¹²³ cosmological-constant problem is a choice of cutoff radius in ρ_Λ=ħc/R⁴: Planck radius gives 10¹¹³, Hubble radius 10⁻¹³⁰, observed 10⁻¹⁰; the hierarchy is (R_Λ/ℓ_Pl)⁴.
theory.technical_interpretation: Bracketing the famous discrepancy with the registry's own values (ID2462, ID2453): ħc/ℓ_Pl⁴≈4×10¹¹³ J/m³ vs ħc/R_H⁴≈9×10⁻¹³¹ J/m³ vs observed ρ_Λ≈6×10⁻¹⁰ J/m³, a 10¹²³ ratio. In the enclosure picture ρ_Λ=ħc/R⁴ is dominated by which radius R the vacuum modes cut off at; the 10¹²³ is the geometric hierarchy (R_Λ/ℓ_Pl)⁴.

formation.note: Hubble-breathing-of-the-enclosure synthesis (see TZPID_HUBBLE_BREATHING_OF_THE_ENCLOSURE.md; from hyper-universality.txt, links ID0400/ID1392/ID0388/ID0187/ID0188)
